description_long: This is a military-style helmet with a rounded dome shape and a short, flared brim encircling the base. The exterior is covered in a camouflage pattern featuring shades of green, brown, tan, and black, designed for concealment in natural or urban environments. There is a black circular patch with a white star emblem on one side, and a rectangular metallic plate with a faint symbol on the rear. Handwritten text reading 'BORN TO KILL' is visible on the front upper surface, adding a personalized touch. The helmet appears to be constructed primarily from a hard composite material, likely reinforced with fabric and padding on the inside for comfort and protection. No visible ventilation holes or visors are present, and a dark band encircles the helmet, possibly for attaching accessories or camouflage material.
description: A military-style camouflage helmet with a rounded dome, dark band, handwritten text, and a black star patch. The surface is matte and rugged, with no visor or vents.
description_view_0: Front-top view showing the handwritten 'BORN TO KILL' text and the black star patch on the left side.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the black star patch and a rectangular metallic plate on the back.
description_view_2: Rear-top view displaying the camouflage pattern and the dark band, with no visible markings or patches.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the 'BORN TO KILL' text and the helmet's rounded shape.
attribute_brand_logo: A black circular patch with a white star emblem is present on the left side of the helmet.
attribute_graphic_design: Camouflage pattern with handwritten 'BORN TO KILL' text and a black star patch; rugged, military aesthetic.
